name: io.github.blocklens/blocklens-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Blocklens — Bitcoin on-chain analytics platform. Access 85+ metrics including MVRV, SOPR, realized price, holder composition, coin days, and more. Query historical and real-time Bitcoin blockchain data.

environmentVariables.description: Blocklens API key (get one at https://blocklens.co/settings)
environmentVariables.name: BLOCKLENS_API_KEY
